category_sources: Official GitHub README describes difi as reviewing and refining Git diffs before push.
source_facts.description says it is a pixel-perfect terminal diff viewer.
display_name_sources: Official README and project site use difi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface found for workflow, piping, controls, configuration, and git integration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/oug-t/difi, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents git repository workflows, piping raw diffs, controls, and git integration.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal diff viewer.
